text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I race exclusively for my oshis! To think that I'll be able to gaze upon the beautiful faces of my precious Umas from up close... How blessed I am!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But of course, touching is strictly off-limits! As a
self-respecting otaku, I must remember to respect
the boundaries!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
